name: kdf_canonical_string — big-endian serialization of KdfParams::DEFAULT
note: The 13-byte canonical embedding of KdfParams inside auth_message: u32_be(memory_kb) || u32_be(time) || u32_be(parallelism) || u8(argon2_version). Pinned so a cross-language impl cannot silently reorder or mis-encode these fields.
